description: W2 consolidated baseline re-pinned after merging the parallel-session work from main (G2-Early-36 cross-patient W2 write tools — medication_add/discontinue, allergy_delete, family_history_add, delete_uploaded_document) and the G2-Final-FB tracks (FB-A agent-step strip + eval-status/PHI-redaction badges, FB-B FHIR persistence path with ObservationWriter, FB-C deploy preflight + status page, FB-D corpus expansion + citation_quote_in_source rule + named-source pills). Every category at 1.0 across 88 cases (43 safe_refusal, 12 schema_valid, 12 citation_present, 12 factually_consistent, 9 no_phi_in_logs). Per-category regression > 5pp OR pass rate < 95% absolute fails the gate (G2-Early-38, S12). Supersedes w2-early-2026-05-06b and w2-final-fb-2026-05-09.
